understood_request: Find all products whose total quantity on hand (summed across all locations) is below their reorder point, and include the vendor names that supply each product.

vault.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lnk_product_vendor (
  product_vendor_hk VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY,
  product_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  vendor_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  load_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  record_source VARCHAR NOT NULL
)
vault.load_sql:
INSERT INTO lnk_product_vendor
SELECT DISTINCT
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(pol.product_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(po.vendor_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS product_vendor_hk,
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(pol.product_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS product_hk,
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(po.vendor_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS vendor_hk,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS load_dts,
  'procurement.po_lines' AS record_source
FROM stg_procurement_po_lines pol
JOIN stg_procurement_purchase_orders po ON pol.po_id = po.po_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM lnk_product_vendor l
  WHERE l.product_vendor_hk = md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(pol.product_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(po.vendor_id AS VARCHAR))))
)

mart.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mart_below_reorder_point_with_vendors (
  product_bk VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  product_name VARCHAR,
  sku VARCHAR,
  reorder_point BIGINT,
  safety_stock BIGINT,
  total_qty_on_hand BIGINT,
  reorder_shortfall BIGINT,
  vendor_bk VARCHAR,
  vendor_name VARCHAR,
  credit_rating BIGINT,
  is_preferred BOOLEAN,
  mart_insert_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
mart.populate_sql:
DELETE FROM mart_below_reorder_point_with_vendors;
INSERT INTO mart_below_reorder_point_with_vendors
WITH measures_cte AS (
  SELECT
    hp.product_hk,
    hp.product_bk,
    spd.product_name,
    spd.sku,
    spd.reorder_point,
    spd.safety_stock,
    SUM(sil.qty_on_hand) AS total_qty_on_hand,
    spd.reorder_point - SUM(sil.qty_on_hand) AS reorder_shortfall
  FROM hub_product hp
  INNER JOIN sat_product_details spd ON hp.product_hk = spd.product_hk AND spd.load_end_dts IS NULL
  INNER JOIN lnk_product_location lpl ON hp.product_hk = lpl.product_hk
  INNER JOIN sat_inventory_levels sil ON lpl.product_location_hk = sil.product_location_hk AND sil.load_end_dts IS NULL
  GROUP BY hp.product_hk, hp.product_bk, spd.product_name, spd.sku, spd.reorder_point, spd.safety_stock
  HAVING SUM(sil.qty_on_hand) < spd.reorder_point
)
SELECT
  mc.product_bk,
  mc.product_name,
  mc.sku,
  mc.reorder_point,
  mc.safety_stock,
  mc.total_qty_on_hand,
  mc.reorder_shortfall,
  CAST(hv.vendor_bk AS VARCHAR),
  svd.vendor_name,
  svd.credit_rating,
  svd.is_preferred,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS mart_insert_dts
FROM measures_cte mc
LEFT JOIN lnk_product_vendor lpv ON mc.product_hk = lpv.product_hk
LEFT JOIN hub_vendor hv ON lpv.vendor_hk = hv.vendor_hk
LEFT JOIN sat_vendor_details svd ON hv.vendor_hk = svd.vendor_hk AND svd.load_end_dts IS NULL
